calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-18-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-18-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Shelley R. O'Brien, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Edith Heenan, named in the complaint as Jane Doe, who was placed under oath and examined.
Eileen Heenan, a witness for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Rand Courtney, sued Joseph Randall Courtney.
Plaintiff's Trial Brief was filed today, October 18, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, October 18, 2010.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on March 4, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Edith Heenan, named in the complaint as Jane Doe, and against defendant Rand Courtney, sued as Joseph Randall Courtney, as follows:

Principal - $1,000,000.00.
Costs - $1,842.12.

Total - $1,001,842.12.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-04-2010 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-04-2010 Set For Trial On Oct-18-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Oct-04-10 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 504

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2010 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-16-2010 Set For Trial On Sep-20-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Sep-03-10 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 604
